user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
so when i chose a near-ATM contract, skewed towards ITM (like 60 delta) when vol is low, 
two things i got:
1) I have near peak gamma
2) but as vol starts to increase when the move starts to happen, the peak will come to me fast
and this will give me good chance to own as much delta as can be
